patterns.name: AWS Access Key ID
patterns.description: AWS IAM access keys always begin with AKIA followed by 16 uppercase alphanumeric chars

patterns.name: AWS Secret Access Key
patterns.description: Context-anchored to the label; captures the 40-char base64-like secret

patterns.name: GCP API Key
patterns.description: Google Cloud API keys start with AIza followed by 35 alphanumeric chars

patterns.name: GCP Service Account Key
patterns.description: GCP service account JSON key identified by the unique client_email field (*.iam.gserviceaccount.com)

patterns.name: GitHub Personal Access Token (classic)
patterns.description: ghp_ = personal, gho_ = OAuth app, ghu_ = user-to-server, ghs_ = server-to-server, ghr_ = refresh

patterns.name: GitHub Fine-grained Token
patterns.description: Fine-grained personal access tokens with github_pat_ prefix and 82-char suffix

patterns.name: Slack Bot/User/App Token
patterns.description: xoxb = bot, xoxp = user, xoxa = app, xoxs = workspace

patterns.name: Stripe Secret Key
patterns.description: Stripe secret API keys with sk_live_ or sk_test_ prefix

patterns.name: Stripe Publishable Key
patterns.description: Stripe publishable API keys with pk_live_ or pk_test_ prefix

patterns.name: SendGrid API Key
patterns.description: SendGrid API keys begin with SG. followed by two base64url segments

patterns.name: Twilio Auth Token
patterns.description: Context-anchored to TWILIO_ prefix; captures the 32-char lowercase hex token

patterns.name: Bearer Token (HTTP header)
patterns.description: Captures the token value after the Bearer keyword

patterns.name: JSON Web Token (JWT)
patterns.description: Three base64url segments; first two always start with ey when decoded from JSON

patterns.name: Generic API Key
patterns.description: Requires a recognizable label; captures the key value (min 16 chars to reduce noise)

patterns.name: Generic Secret / Token
patterns.description: Context-anchored to common token field names

patterns.name: Generic Password Field
patterns.description: Context-anchored; captures assigned value (6+ non-whitespace chars)

patterns.name: Private Key (PEM header)
patterns.description: Detects the header line of a PEM-encoded private key block

patterns.name: Database Connection String
patterns.description: Covers MongoDB (plain and SRV), MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redis, and generic JDBC

patterns.name: Azure Storage Connection String
patterns.description: Azure Storage SDK format; AccountKey is always 88 base64 chars (512-bit key)

patterns.name: Social Security Number (SSN)
patterns.description: US SSN format; invalid ranges (000, 666, 900-999) and zero group/serial are filtered by validator

patterns.name: Credit Card Number
patterns.description: Strict BIN-range patterns: Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Discover (no spaces or dashes); Luhn check filters false positives
